title: Flashing Ores
description: Ore border pack but it also flashes!
body:
⚠️ EPILEPSY WARNING: This page and texture pack contains flashing images!

Are you having trouble finding the ores you want despite having ore border pack enabled? This pack might be the solution to your problem!

Flashing Ores is a lightweight texture pack focusing on maximizing the visibility of all ores by adding a flashing animation on its textures. With this pack, you will not miss a single ore when mining!

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Block border
- Flashing animation
- Glowing texture (requires Optifine/Continuity)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Blocks</summary>

- All Overworld ores, including its deepslate variant (Coal, Copper, Iron, Gold, Redstone, Lapis Lazuli, Emerald, Diamond)
- All Nether ores (Gold, Quartz, Ancient Debris)
- All raw ore blocks (Iron, Copper, Gold)
- Amethyst Cluster

</details>



![Flashing ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ce02366e0a42a898b69352bfbd023365223d68c.gif)


<details>
<summary>Alternative packs</summary>

- All alternative packs can be downloaded [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flashing-ores/versions). (the one marked as beta)
- These packs only contains a specific type of ore.

</details>



## **FAQ**
- Q: _The ores doesn't flash/stop flashing when far away!!!_
  - A: Make sure turn off any option that might disables texture animation. (For Sodium, disable "Animate Only Visible Textures". For Optifine, enable "Terrain Animated".)
- Q: _The ores are not glowing!!!_
  - A: Make sure to turn on "Emissive Textures" on Optifine/Continuity settings.
